purpose: Completion criteria for coverage hardening and future gate enforcement.
rules: M34.5 is a verification/hardening milestone, not feature runtime implementation.
Each evidence-correction unit must anchor auxiliary labels to primary original source evidence.
Each registry-contract unit must have required scripts and blocking gates registered.
notes: M34.5 manifest is complete for hardening scope only. It does not implement feature runtime behavior for M35-M52.
Evidence-correction rows anchor auxiliary cflag/source labels to primary original-game/CSV/VariableSize.CSV evidence.
Registry-contract rows ensure M35-M52 and final verification commands exist as explicit gate contracts.
Closure responsibilityIntegrity is now implemented-verified, so M34.5 can close under the source-unit manifest rule.

coverage gate hardening: source evidence, crosscheck, closure, and future gate enforcement
turn pipeline owner: turn/time/monthly/weekly hook and automatic processing rows
visit/facility owner: visit place, facility, unlock, action, cost, condition, and result rows
work/business owner: work, brothel, part-time, special work condition/calculation/result rows
filming scene definition owner: filming scene, target condition, scene condition, display, and expected result rows
filming execution owner: filming execution, release, sales, income, fans, score, history, and turn rows
training session owner: training target/actor/assistant/command selection and session lifecycle rows
training availability owner: 105 training command availability, unavailable reason, role, state, resource, and place rows
training effect 0-34 owner: training command 0-34 source calculation, result owner, cleanup, and verification rows
training effect 35-69 owner: training command 35-69 source calculation, result owner, cleanup, and verification rows
training effect 70-plus/postprocess owner: training command 70 and above, postprocess, event/equipment/resource, and all-command aggregate rows
common system owner: ability up, rest, recovery, automatic item use, and common maintenance rows
mission lifecycle owner: mission definition, accept/progress/report/complete/fail/expire/reward/penalty rows
event/world owner: event trigger, condition, text, effect, world/story flag, and hook rows
ending/meta owner: ending condition/result, inheritance, global/meta save, clear bonus, and global unlock rows
view/text/settings closer: info/help/settings/debug, PRINT/HTML/message/help/status text, and remaining feature rows
full save/load owner: full save schema, migration, corrupted/future/old save, and feature roundtrip rows
final auditor: final source gap, orphan, role-only, blocker, approved exclusion, and source conflict rows
complete port verdict owner: complete coverage, UI/action flow, save/load, ending, smoke, long-play, failure matrix, and final report
M34.5 closure includes responsibilityIntegrity proving hardening responsibility was validated, not only counted.
